title: frodinia gleasonii
intro: Frodinia gleasonii, also known as the frog's bit, is a species of flowering plant in the family Podostemaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Frodinia gleasonii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The plant has been used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, including fever reduction and skin conditions, and can be found in teas, tinctures, and salves.
